case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ROBERTO CARLOS RAMIREZ MARCELINO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $654.88 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, ROBERTO CARLOS RAMIREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED APR-22-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, ROBERTO CARLOS RAMIREZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCELINO, ROBERTO CARLOS RAMIREZ $654.88 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $734.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ROBERTO CARLOS RAMIREZ MARCELINO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
